ddls:
CREATE TABLE "census_tracts" (
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each census tract */,
  "geo_id2" TEXT /* Alternate identifier for each census tract */,
  "geo_display_label" TEXT /* Display label for each census tract */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the census tract is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County in which the census tract is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the census tract */,
  "total_households" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the census tract */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the census tract */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the census tract */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the census tract in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of computing device */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the computing device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the device type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the device (e.g., 'Personal', 'Portable') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate */,
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Reference to the census tract for which the estimate is made */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of computing device */,
  "estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated number of households with access to the computing device */,
  "margin_of_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for the estimate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the estimate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the estimate */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or remarks about the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_estimates_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES census_tracts ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_estimates_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of computing device */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategory_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate */,
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Reference to the census tract for which the estimate is made */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory of computing device */,
  "estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated number of households with access to the computing device subcategory */,
  "margin_of_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for the estimate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the estimate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the estimate */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or remarks about the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategory_estimates_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES census_tracts ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategory_estimates_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES device_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "no_computer_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each estimate */,
  "geo_id" TEXT /* Reference to the census tract for which the estimate is made */,
  "estimate" INTEGER /* Estimated number of households with no computing devices */,
  "margin_of_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for the estimate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the estimate */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the estimate */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or remarks about the estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_no_computer_estimates_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES census_tracts ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object storing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
